title: macairea theresiae
intro: Macairea theresiae, also known as "erva de São Tiago", is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae, native to Brazil. The medicinal properties of Macairea theresiae include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Macairea theresiae are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
